summary: Project involves comic-style visuals/scenes, with a character named Miles and a fight scene requiring comic-style images.

existing_features.title: Update the comic panel illustration assets so that Miles Morales is visually depicted as Black in any panel where he is shown (including panels where he is clearly visible, in shadow, or partially visible).

Ensure the fight/action scenes are represented with comic-style pictures (not blank/missing/placeholder visuals) by updating the existing fight-scene illustration assets to clearly read as comic panels with dynamic action composition.

Revise `illustrationAlt` strings in `frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts` for panels featuring Miles and for the fight/action panels so the alt text accurately describes the updated visuals in clear English.

new_feature_requests.summary: Depict Miles as Black in character visuals
Render the fight scene using comic-style pictures/imagery

projectName: Update Miles depiction and ensure fight scenes use comic-style illustrations
